hero.name: Kevin Meneses
hero.tagline: I help SaaS and tech companies communicate complex ideas clearly — from technical documentation to content that converts.

pitch.headline: Turn developers into customers with technical content that builds trust
paragraphs: Most tech companies have a great product, but a common problem: very few developers understand why they should use it.
Features don't sell. Documentation alone doesn't create demand. And traditional advertising rarely works with a technical audience.
That's where educational content comes in.
pitch.body: I create technical content that explains real problems, shows solutions with actual code, and positions your product naturally within developers' workflows. The goal isn't aggressive selling — it's building trust, authority, and adoption.
pitch.experience: Over the past few years I've worked with APIs, AI platforms, developer tools, fintech solutions, and SaaS products — creating articles, videos, and tutorials that reach thousands of engineers, data scientists, and automation professionals.
pitch.question: How can this technology help a developer solve a real problem?
pitch.closing: Because when content delivers value first, conversions follow.

offerings.title: What I can do for your company
items: Use cases with AI, Python, and automation
Content for Medium, LinkedIn, Dev.to, and company blogs

process.title: My process
process.body1: First, I get to know your product, study the market, and figure out what your audience is actually looking for. Then I build a tutorial or case study where your solution makes sense within a real problem.
process.body2: The result is content that educates, positions your brand as a reference, and keeps driving traffic months after publishing.

whyMe.title: Why work with me?
whyMe.intro: I combine three profiles that rarely come together in one person:

profiles.title: Developer
profiles.description: Able to build real examples and explain complex concepts simply.

profiles.title: Tech consultant
profiles.description: Experienced in CRM, automation, AI, and enterprise software.

profiles.title: Content creator
profiles.description: With an established audience of thousands of developers and tech professionals.

whyMe.closing: That lets me create content that's not only technically accurate, but also engaging, easy to consume, and results-driven.

asset.title: More than content: an asset for your business
paragraphs: A good article can rank on Google for years.
A video can keep generating views and customers long after it's published.
A well-built tutorial can become the first experience hundreds — or thousands — of developers have with your product.
asset.closing: Content stops being an expense and becomes an asset that works for your business 24 hours a day.

talk.title: Let's talk
talk.body: If you're building an API, an AI platform, a SaaS product, or a developer tool and want to grow your visibility with high-quality technical content, I'd love to help.
talk.closing: Let's create content developers actually want to read, watch, and share.

testimonials.title: What people I've worked with say

items.quote: Kevin's content doesn't stay surface-level — he understands the API, tests the examples, and explains exactly why a developer should use EODHD. His work helped us convert organic traffic better.
items.name: Nick
items.statLabel: in revenue generated through organic content
